title: Screen before world
description: Puts a blank screen that pauses your game when you load a world that you can exit.
body:
Have you ever been in rush and din't have time to press ESC after your world loads, no worrys, or you need a little warm up because you quickly exited the world and it was already loading... Well,
the summar explains it, that's all it does and it only has about 44 lines of code. Dependencies: **Nothing**!
